message:
feat(ui): add WorkerTable for rich worker fleet display (bd-3cny)

Add WorkerTable component that renders worker fleet status with rich formatting:
- Table with columns: ID, Host, Status, Slots, Speed, Circuit state
- Status with colored indicators (Online, Busy, Degraded, Offline, Draining)
- Circuit breaker state display with recovery countdown
- Summary footer with total counts and slot availability

Features:
- Rich mode: uses rich_rust Table with styled columns
- Plain mode: ASCII table fallback for non-interactive terminals
- Machine mode: suppresses output (caller uses print_json instead)
- Empty state handling with helpful hint for adding workers

Helper functions:
- truncate_str(): truncates strings with ellipsis for display
- format_circuit_state(): formats circuit breaker state
- format_status_rich/plain(): formats worker status with icons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
